original: The Zinga 16b is the latest model in the popular laser assault rifle range produced by the Haurwsz tech-hive. Easily recognizable by its long, thin, streamlined design, the Zinga trades up-front power for quietness, accuracy and adaptability. As well as being able to fire efficiently lethal beams of coherent radiation, the Zinga 16b can be switched to fire so-called “stupefy” shots instead: a missile pocket of microbots programmed to sink into an unshielded target and induce a temporary state of stunned euphoria, the perfect synergy for the combat capabilities of the tarratch.
